The Originals

It started with three kids and three posters.

Before OTK was a studio, it was a kitchen-table project — one poster for each of our kids, capturing exactly who they are. Their personality, their sports, their obsessions, their funny little sayings. They loved them so much we knew every family deserved one.

The first three — straight off our own wall

One poster.
Exactly your kid.

Tell us who your child really is — the loud one, the gym rat, the giggle boss — and send us a photo. We illustrate them in our signature style with their name, their world, and the things that make them them.

You receive three different concepts and pick your favourite. Digital file, printed poster, framed, or on a tee.

The Toddler Boss The Girl Athlete The Teen Competitor
Order a personality poster →

Custom Family Portraits

Send a photo.
Get your family, illustrated.

We recreate your favourite family photo as a warm illustrated portrait — same moment, same setting, everyone's real likeness. Then put it anywhere you like: print, frame, canvas, or mug.

i.

Share your photo

Pick the family photo you love most. Beach day, holiday morning, the backyard — any moment that feels like you.

ii.

We illustrate it

Same composition, same setting, every person's real likeness — hair, glasses, the dog, all of it.

iii.

You approve first

Nothing prints until you've seen it and said yes. We revise the details until it's exactly right.

iv.

Delivered your way

Digital file in days. Or printed, framed, on canvas, or wrapped around a mug — shipped to your door.

"

Our promise: if you don't love your portrait, we revise it until you do — or you get a full refund. No questions asked. We're a family selling to families; it has to be right.
